groundingOperation.target: The surface burden that should become smaller.

distortionBoundary.acceptableLoss: Material the reader can lose without changing the intended model or action.
distortionBoundary.unacceptableLoss: Any loss that would change the intended model, truth boundary, or action.

preservedRelations.statement: The source-supported relation that must survive.
preservedRelations.reconstructionTarget: What a cold reader should be able to recover from the final.

finalEvidence: An exact span from the current final.
relationEvidence.reconstruction: How the final lets the reader recover this relation.

independentReview.reviewer: A fresh reader who did not create the draft.
independentReview.inputBoundary: The current final plus a minimal audience description only.
independentReview.reconstruction: The required relations the reader recovered from the final.
